sections.heading: Colette Kress, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

chunks.text: Turning to margins. In the first quarter our gross margin expanded to a record level, and I want to be very clear on this point: we recorded no meaningful inventory write-downs or excess-inventory charges during the period. The transition to Blackwell has been seamless from a cost standpoint, and we expect gross margins to continue climbing through the remainder of the fiscal year.
chunks.speaker: Colette Kress
chunks.speaker_role: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

sections.heading: Jensen Huang, President and Chief Executive Officer

chunks.text: Demand for our Blackwell platform is extraordinary and continues to outpace what we are able to supply. Data Center revenue reached a new record in the quarter as cloud service providers and enterprises raced to build out AI infrastructure. This is the beginning of a decade-long build-out of AI factories.
chunks.speaker: Jensen Huang

chunks.text: Thank you for taking my question. Can you talk about seasonality in the gaming segment as we move into the back half of the year?
chunks.speaker: Analyst - Morgan Stanley

sections.heading: Jensen Huang, President and Chief Executive Officer

chunks.text: Sure. Our desktop gaming products typically see stronger revenue in the second half of our fiscal year, consistent with historical patterns, though we always caution that past seasonality may not repeat.
chunks.speaker: Jensen Huang
